title: Kitsune maska
description: A simple set of resources that adds the ability to change the appearance of Jack's pumpkin on the player's head.
body:
## # For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

You will need Optifine or CITResewn to work properly.

Rename your jack pumpkin to "Kitsune mask" to make it a Kitsune fox mask.
